sessionStart.bash: d="skills/commentable-html"; m="$d/.skill-resources-1.118.0.ok"; [ -e "$m" ] && exit 0; py=$(command -v python3 2>/dev/null || command -v python 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$py" ] && "$py" -E -s hooks/extract_resources.py --version 1.118.0 --agent copilot >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; true
sessionStart.powershell: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; if (Test-Path 'skills\commentable-html\.skill-resources-1.118.0.ok') { exit 0 }; $py = Get-Command python3, python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($py) { & $py.Source -E -s 'hooks\extract_resources.py' --version 1.118.0 --agent copilot *> $null }"
